acceptance_criteria: compat-test runs all probes and prints PASS/FAIL per step; test Note is actually delivered to target inbox; Follow/Accept roundtrip completes; test cleans up after itself (sends Unfollow, Delete); works against mastodon.social with a real persona
description: Implement 'smallhold compat-test --target=mastodon.social --persona=writer' that runs a canned suite of interoperability probes against a live remote server. Probes: WebFinger lookup, actor fetch, send Follow, wait for Accept, post a test Note and verify delivery, send Delete. Report pass/fail per probe. Useful for regression testing after changes.
design: Implement as a CLI subcommand that talks directly to SQLite (server must be running for HTTP listening). Probes are sequential with timeouts. Print structured output: [PASS] WebFinger lookup, [FAIL] Activity delivery (timeout after 30s). Use reqwest for outbound probes.
title: smallhold compat-test CLI subcommand
